reviews.review_description: I love this game because of 3 reasons first it is super fun and chill second it has great gameplay and maps with great music and cool cosmetics third the updates are fire🔥🔥🔥 and updates come out very quick.  But also this game has everything it needs to become popular plus there is more to come

developer_response.body: Thank you for your wonderful review! More updates are on the way this spoooky October!
